intent: Measure whether the 8-commit batch (32f7142 through 7617c0a) improved routing precision — i.e., when a user types one of these utterances, does the right skill win the top-match slot more often than before?
evaluation_method: routing_test.py (token-overlap scoring against all loaded skill descriptions). Each utterance is a tuple of (expected_skill, user_phrase). For each, we record top-match, top-score, runner-up score, and result (clear win / tie / loss). Aggregate as pass_rate.

baseline_configuration.note: The pre-fix routing_test.py had a regex bug (only matched `description: >\n…`) so it loaded only 5 of 31+ skills. The 7W baseline was therefore measured against a 5-skill pool, not the full marketplace.

current_configuration.note: After fixing the regex bug in 004e5e1, the test loads all 35 skills. The 15W/1T/2L is measured against the full marketplace. This is the REAL baseline going forward; the pre-004e5e1 7W was vacuous.
